---
name: 📖 Documentation
about: Report documentation issues or suggest improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## 📖 Documentation Issue

### Type
- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Suggestion for new documentation

### Location

Which documentation file or section is affected?
- File: [e.g., README.md, docs/ENV_CONFIGURATION.md]
- Section: [e.g., Quick Start, Configuration]

### Description

Describe the issue or improvement suggestion.

### Suggested Change

If you have a suggestion, please describe how to improve it.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have identified the specific location of the issue
